Weak signal: generic cart or checkout wording (\bcart\b)

topPriorityIssues.title: Mobile Readability May Be Crowded
topPriorityIssues.explanation: Dense first-screen content can make the primary action compete with navigation, promotional copy, or secondary links.

topPriorityIssues.recommendedFirstAction: Rebalance the first mobile viewport around one primary action; this scan saw 18 links and about 713 text characters before scroll.

topPriorityIssues.explanation: Store search does not appear prominently in the visible navigation, which may slow product discovery for catalog-heavy stores.

topPriorityIssues.recommendedFirstAction: Expose search in the desktop header and mobile menu, then confirm it returns useful product and category results.

topPriorityIssues.recommendedFirstAction: Confirm platform clues from source assets, cart and checkout URLs, product URL patterns, and admin or team knowledge before making platform-specific recommendations.

topPriorityIssues.evidenceSummary: No strong CTA was detected in the first mobile viewport. Desktop CTA labels sampled: Melbourne Demons NB 26 Adult Home Guernsey, Add to Cart, Melbourne Demons NB 26 Player Run Out Tee, Add to Cart; mobile first-screen links: 12.
topPriorityIssues.recommendedFirstAction: Reuse the strongest existing CTA (Melbourne Demons NB 26 Adult Home Guernsey or Add to Cart) inside the first mobile viewport and make it visually distinct from secondary links.

topPriorityIssues.title: Mobile Readability May Be Crowded
topPriorityIssues.explanation: Dense first-screen content can make the primary action compete with navigation, promotional copy, or secondary links.
topPriorityIssues.evidenceSummary: The mobile first viewport showed 12 visible links and about 3043 visible text characters, which triggered a crowding risk.
topPriorityIssues.recommendedFirstAction: Trim first-screen mobile copy and promotional text; this scan counted about 3043 visible text characters before scroll.

name: Americas Bossa
platformExplanation: Detected BigCommerce with high confidence because platform-specific evidence was visible: BigCommerce asset or domain reference; BigCommerce asset or domain reference; BigCommerce storefront data or stencil signal.
platformEvidence: Signal count: 8 strong and 2 weak BigCommerce indicators.
Strong signal: BigCommerce asset or domain reference (cdn11\.bigcommerce\.com)
Strong signal: BigCommerce asset or domain reference (cdn\d*\.bigcommerce\.com)
Strong signal: BigCommerce storefront data or stencil signal (\bbcData\b)
Strong signal: BigCommerce asset or domain reference (bigcommerce\.com)
Strong signal: BigCommerce storefront data or stencil signal (\bStencil\b)
Strong signal: BigCommerce storefront data or stencil signal (\bstencil\b)
Strong signal: BigCommerce cart or checkout endpoint (cart\.php)
Strong signal: BigCommerce cart or checkout endpoint (checkout\.php)
Weak signal: generic cart or checkout wording (\bcheckout\b)
Weak signal: generic cart or checkout wording (\bcart\b)

scoreExplanation.whyAssigned: Assigned as needs-review because mobile CTA, navigation, search, and first-screen density signals were evaluated together.
scoreExplanation.evidenceInfluenced: Mobile Readability May Be Crowded; search visible: yes; first-screen links: 8; first-screen text estimate: 1161 characters.
scoreExplanation.whatWouldImprove: Lighter mobile density, clearer visual hierarchy, visible search, and clearer product/category paths would raise this score.

scoreExplanation.whyAssigned: Assigned as needs-review based on purchase momentum, CTA visibility, checkout continuity, and purchase-confidence cues.
scoreExplanation.evidenceInfluenced: 3 of 6 trust-signal groups were visible; missing or weak groups: reviews or testimonials, warranty or guarantee, secure payment cues; mobile CTA above fold: yes. 1 related cross-category signal also influenced the score.
scoreExplanation.whatWouldImprove: A prominent buying action, clear cart or checkout path, reviews, shipping/returns clarity, and payment reassurance near product decisions would improve it.

scoreExplanation.whyAssigned: Assigned as needs-review from platform confidence, metadata, console errors, and failed request evidence.
scoreExplanation.evidenceInfluenced: Platform: BigCommerce (High confidence, 95%); console errors: 2; failed requests: 2.
scoreExplanation.whatWouldImprove: Clearer platform evidence, clean metadata, fewer console errors, and fewer failed frontend requests would improve this score.

scoreExplanation.whyAssigned: Assigned as needs-review from visible analytics, tag manager, pixel, and email/lead-capture signals.
scoreExplanation.evidenceInfluenced: Detected 2 supported marketing tools: Google Analytics / GA4, Google Tag Manager. Lead capture visible: yes.
scoreExplanation.whatWouldImprove: Visible GA4/GTM, ad pixels, email capture, and confirmed conversion events across the buying path would improve this score.

scoreExplanation.whyAssigned: Assigned as healthy from cart, checkout, support, returns, and order communication visibility.
scoreExplanation.evidenceInfluenced: Support/contact: visible; order/returns language: visible; shipping/returns: visible.
scoreExplanation.whatWouldImprove: Visible support, order status, shipping, returns, and fulfillment communication would improve it.

topPriorityIssues.title: Mobile Readability May Be Crowded
topPriorityIssues.explanation: Dense first-screen content can make the primary action compete with navigation, promotional copy, or secondary links.
topPriorityIssues.evidenceSummary: The mobile first viewport showed 8 visible links and about 1161 visible text characters, which triggered a crowding risk.
topPriorityIssues.recommendedFirstAction: Rebalance the first mobile viewport around one primary action; this scan saw 8 links and about 1161 text characters before scroll.
